data.title: TestMu AI announces 2025 Partner of the Year Award winners, recognizing industry leaders in quality engineering.
data.description: On February 14, 2026, the annual partner awards took place to honor the strategic excellence of industry partners and visionary individuals who are revolutionizing quality engineering. The event was held in both San Francisco and Noida, India. TestMu AI, formerly LambdaTest, a pioneering full-stack company, was one of the highlights of the event.

data.title: Pro Cheer League's second match in ATL draws first sell-out crowd of the season, Miami Metal makes statement.
data.description: In the second match of the inaugural season, Miami Metal delivered a strong performance in Atlanta on February 14, 2026. The Pro Cheer League captivated the audience with a display of elite athleticism and precision from both teams. The event marked the league's first sold-out game, drawing a significant crowd to witness the thrilling competition.

data.title: Coreline Soft and INFINITT North America partner to bring "Zero-Click" AI workflow to U.S. radiology practices, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: A report released today highlights the significant impact of seamless AI integration on enhancing efficiency, accuracy, and revenue for radiology groups. The evolving global medical AI market is moving towards integrated operational infrastructure, with Coreline Soft leading the way. The study emphasizes the benefits of this transition in boosting performance and financial outcomes for radiology groups in Phillipbsurg, N.J., and Seoul, South Korea. This shift marks a pivotal moment as organizations prioritize not just algorithm accuracy but also overall operational coherence.

data.title: China invested heavily in chip industry over past decade but still lags behind foreign competitors in production and performance.
data.description: After more than ten years of Beijing promoting self-sufficiency, Chinese companies are manufacturing chips that are less in quantity and quality compared to their foreign counterparts.

data.title: Upcoming 139th Canton Fair to hold promotion conferences in Germany and Morocco, strengthening global trading cooperation.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on February 14, 2026, the Canton Fair, a crucial link between China and the global trade industry, is strengthening its international partnerships. The upcoming 139th Canton Fair will feature two significant promotion conferences as part of its efforts to broaden its global cooperation network.

data.title: 2026 Toy of the Year winners announced: Primal Hatch wins "Toy of the Year" award, Pokémon TCG: Mega Evolution Elite Trainer Box wins "People's Choice".
data.description: At the 2026 Toy of the Year Awards in New York on February 13, Primal Hatch snagged the prestigious "Toy of the Year" award, marking a significant achievement in the toy industry. Additionally, the Pokémon TCG: Mega Evolution Elite Trainer Box secured the "People's Choice" award. The event celebrated leading innovations in the market and witnessed exceptional competition among top contenders. This recognition further underscores the impact and popularity of these winning products among consumers and industry experts alike.

data.title: Bitcoin holders face a test as inflation slows, expected to surge in value post-deflation on USD impact: Anthony Pompliano.
data.description: According to Bitcoin entrepreneur Anthony Pompliano, the value of Bitcoin is expected to increase significantly once deflation no longer overshadows the impact on the US dollar.

data.title: INDOCHINO introduces group pricing for wedding parties, aiming to simplify coordination and provide structured pricing.
data.description: A custom suiting company has implemented organized group pricing for wedding parties in Vancouver, BC and New York. INDOCHINO's 2026 wedding program offers efficient group rates and easy organization for complete wedding parties. This new initiative aims to streamline the process for wedding groups and enhance coordination.

data.title: Moose Toys' Bluey Supermarket wins Playset of the Year award at Toy Foundation's 26th TOTY Awards.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 13, 2026, Moose Toys, a prominent figure in the toy sector, secured the Playset of the Year® title for Bluey Supermarket at the 26th edition of the Toy Foundation™'s annual Toy of the Year® (TOTY®) Awards. The TOTY Award victors were revealed during an awards event held this evening.

data.title: DBGI bought convertible notes and extended note conversion by Series D Preferred Stock holders through private agreements.
data.description: Austin, Texas on Feb. 13, 2026 - Digital Brands Group, Inc., known as DBG and listed under NASDAQ as DBGI, a company focused on eCommerce and fashion, revealed that holders of all Series D Preferred Stock have engaged in private agreements regarding their ownership and rights to these shares. The Shareholder Agreements were disclosed by the Company. Each Series D Share can be converted into common stock at the holder's choice, with a conversion price set at 80% of the lowest closing price of the Common Stock over the five trading days preceding the conversion date.

data.title: Armlogi Holding Corp. reveals Q2 and first half of fiscal year 2026 results in Walnut, Calif. Ended Dec 2025.
data.description: In Walnut, California, on February 13, 2026, Armlogi Holding Corp. revealed its financial results for the fiscal 2026 second quarter and the six-month period closing on December 31, 2025. Armlogi, known as "Armlogi" or the "Company," listed on Nasdaq as BTOC, operates as a warehousing and logistics service provider in the U.S. specializing in supply-chain solutions, warehouse management, and order fulfillment. The report signifies the Company's performance over these periods.

data.title: Bitcoin value to surge as inflation fades, says Pompliano. Deflation to boost BTC price past record highs.
data.description: Bitcoin is predicted to increase in value significantly after the end of deflation, surpassing its current worth. This projection comes from renowned Bitcoin entrepreneur Anthony Pompliano. He suggests that this surge will overshadow the effects on the US dollar.

data.title: Law firm KSF investigates officers and directors of Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (NYSE: INSP) on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, disclosed the launch of an investigation by KSF into Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (NYSE: INSP). This investigation is concerning certain undisclosed aspects related to INSP.

data.title: Investigation started on Lantheus Holdings, Inc. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Former Attorney General leading. (Numbers omitted)
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that his firm is conducting an investigation into Lantheus Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqGM: LNTH). This investigation began in August.

data.title: Investigation launched into Maplebear Inc. (d/b/a Instacart) officers and directors - KSF initiates inquiry into CART.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), revealed that KSF has launched a probe into Maplebear Inc. operating as Instacart (NasdaqGS: CART).

data.title: Dowinx is enhancing gaming chairs with ergonomic design, advanced materials & user-driven innovation.
data.description: In Las Vegas on February 13, 2026, Dowinx, a renowned worldwide brand specializing in ergonomic gaming furniture, is revolutionizing extended sitting experiences with a focus on user comfort. Through a design approach centered on user needs, Dowinx combines ergonomic design, cutting-edge materials, and innovative functionality in their gaming chairs.

data.title: Tips on navigating the risky market, with Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia impacting indexes.
data.description: Ways to mitigate risks in a volatile market have been outlined, as major companies like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia demonstrate significant resilience. These firms are concealing substantial potential, influencing the market positively. The Dow Jones Futures are under scrutiny amidst these challenging market conditions, urging investors to handle their investments cautiously. Indexes have been impacted by the performance of Apple, Google, Amazon, and Nvidia.

data.title: Pramata launches contract intelligence extension compatible with Claude Cowork, enhancing contract negotiation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Pramata has recently launched a Contract Intelligence Extension compatible with Claude Cowork, aiming to revolutionize contract negotiation and management for enterprises. This extension, designed to work in conjunction with the Claude Cowork Legal plugin, enhances enterprise contract workflows by integrating structured commercial relationship context. The Claude Cowork Legal plugin, which is currently in research preview, aims to streamline contract processes and boost efficiency in managing contracts. The launch comes after multiple revisions to the initial release on February 5, 2026.

data.title: LS Cable & System USA investing $50 million to expand Tarboro facility, enhancing US manufacturing and energy infrastructure.
data.description: LS Cable & System USA, Inc. announced a significant $50 million investment plan to enlarge its Tarboro, North Carolina manufacturing plant. The move, part of LS Cable & System Ltd.'s strategy, demonstrates a dedication to advancing manufacturing operations in the US. By bolstering the local supply chain and contributing to national energy infrastructure, the company solidifies its position as a crucial industry ally. The expansion initiative will involve incorporating two new...
